Trucks has built an unmatched reputation over the last two decades for customizing and selling thousands of the highest quality used vehicles in the country. Our inventory is nationally sourced by our certified buyers who cherry-pick only the best-of-the-best of what is available. These vehicles then go through an 82-point inspection process to guarantee quality and safety. Our s are installed by our own factory-trained technicians who have thousands of hours of experience. The installation is then inspected by a second dedicated quality-control technician before being sent to our state-of-the-art Hunter Engineering laser alignment rack. Our aftermarket research and development team always matches the best fitting , shocks, and wheel tire combinations to each individual vehicle for optimal off-road performance while maintaining an incredibly smooth ride on the street. description: This Certified 2026 Honda HR-V Sport, has a Boost Blue Pearl exterior and an Black interior color. 1,234 miles.  Stock Number 262150R. You can connect with us by calling .   Important Package and Feature InformationSafety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. description: This Certified 2026 Honda CR-V EX-L, has a Canyon River Blue Metallic exterior and an Black interior color. 14,725 miles.  Stock Number 2H424434. You can connect with us by calling (719) 602-5882.     No Accidents!  One Owner!   Important Package and Feature Information      Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring  CANYON RIVER BLUE METALLIC, BLACK, LEATHER SEAT TRIM   Certification Program Details: HondaTrue Certified Details: * Limited Warranty: 24 Month/100,000 Mile (whichever comes first) after new car warranty expires or from certified purchase date * Warranty Deductible: $0 * Roadside Assistance * Vehicles purchased within New Vehicle Limited Warranty period: extends New Vehicle Limited Warranty to 5 years*/100,000 miles*. Now, with adaptive cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.   Adaptive cruise control; your ultimate co-pilot.Safety and Security Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. No Accidents!  One Owner!    OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:      Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Wireless Apple CarPlay and Wireless Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Safety is paramount, and the Equinox LT is equipped with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety technologies, including OnStar and Chevrolet connected services, ABS brakes, electronic stability control, and a host of airbags to keep you and your loved ones protected. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Predictive brake assist - Be prepared for your big brake. Predictive brake assist monitors the available distance in front of you compared to your vehicles speed.  If your speed exceeds the required distance to stop short of a collision, it readies your brakes to apply maximum stopping force when you use them.  Predictive brake assist helps see to it that you stop.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring      At Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge, we're here to Serve you! Whether youre navigating urban streets or tackling more rugged paths, the CR-V Hybrid promises an exhilarating and efficient ride with every journey.  Step inside to discover a sanctuary of comfort and cutting-edge technology. The luxurious leather seats envelop you in style and warmth, especially with the heated front seating and a heated steering wheel for those chilly mornings. Enjoy tailored convenience thanks to memory seating that remembers your perfect driving position, while the power moonroof invites the outside world into your daily drive, all at the touch of a button.  Technology mavens will feel at home with the integrated navigation system powered by Google Maps and seamless smartphone integration through Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. The Bose Premium Sound System with 12 speakers takes your listening experience to another level, offering concert-like audio clarity and richness. Meanwhile, every control  from audio to navigation  is effortlessly accessible through steering wheel-mounted controls, letting you stay connected without distraction.  Safety is of paramount importance, and the CR-V Hybrid Sport Touring has you covered with a suite of advanced features. The Blind Spot Information System keeps an eye out, ensuring you're always aware of your surroundings. Adaptive Cruise Control with Low-Speed Follow takes the stress out of highway driving, adapting the CR-Vs speed to keep you safely distanced from vehicles ahead. Premium advantages in our King Ranch cabin include exclusive heated/ventilated Kingsville leather power front and heated rear seats, a heated Kingsville leather power steering wheel, dual-zone automatic climate control, a power rear window, and power-adjustable pedals. description: Why BUY from Moses Toyota of Morgantown?    When you choose this Classic Silver Metallic 2026 Toyota Corolla LE with 473 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service!             What this vehicle includes:            Convenience Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.Safety and Security Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring    CLASSIC SILVER METALLIC, BLACK, FABRIC SEAT TRIM   Come on in to Moses Toyota of Morgantown today at 60 Don Knotts Boulevard Morgantown WV 26508 or call 304-773-3238 to schedule a test drive![!@@Additional Info@@!]Engine: 2.0L Dynamic Force 4-Cyl DOHC 16-Valve|Transmission: Continuously Variable (CVT)|Transmission w/Driver Selectable Mode and Sequential Shift Control|Front-wheel drive|3.79 Axle Ratio|Battery w/Run Down Protection|Gas-Pressurized Shock Absorbers|Front And Rear Anti-Roll Bars|Electric Power-Assist Steering|13.2 Gal. description: This  2026 TESLA MODEL Y , has a GRAY exterior and  interior color with only 7,872 miles.  Stock Number PV355792.  You can connect with us by calling 866-764-1556.     No Accidents!  One Owner!         Convenience GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.Safety and Security Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. You can connect with us by calling 888-401-7807.          Important Package and Feature Information  Option Group 01    Safety and Security Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. description: Get behind the wheel of the Ultimate Driving Machine® for less with a BMW Certified vehicle from BMW of Lafayette! With a BMW Certified vehicle, you don't have to compromise on performance for price, which makes it an excellent option for those who want the performance of a new BMW without the new price tag. Take this 2026 BMW X5 xDrive40i for instance...  Key Features & Packages:  Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and  and Telematics Wireless Apple CarPlay and Wireless Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.  Other Notable Features/Options    Why BMW Certified?  Comprehensive Inspections - Everything from mileage to engine performance to the operation of the glove box is meticulously scrutinized by a BMW-trained technician, so nothing falls through the cracks. Warranty Peace of Mind - Every Certified BMW covers you for one year with unlimited vehicle miles, after the expiration of the four-year/50,000 mile New Vehicle Limited Warranty for a total of five years/unlimited vehicle miles. Roadside Assistance - As a BMW Certified owner, you'll receive an additional three years of BMW Roadside Assistance and a complimentary oil change.  Loaner Vehicles - Any time you service your vehicle with a BMW dealership, you will receive complimentary service loaners (subject to dealer availability) or offered alternative transportation (charges may apply) for the duration of your protection plan. Free Vehicle History Report - At BMW of Lafayette, every Certified BMW also comes with a vehicle history report .   As part of Moss Motors, BMW of Lafayette has been serving Acadiana with integrity and excellence for over 50 years. We don't just sell luxury - we build relationships. With decades of trust, unmatched service, and a legacy of customer care, we ensure every vehicle we offer reflects both our high standards and your high expectations... description: Introducing the rugged and adventurous 2016 Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Sport, your ticket to explore the great outdoors in style! With its iconic design and thrilling performance, this SUV is perfect for those who crave excitement on and off the road.  Under the hood, you'll find a powerful 3.6L V6 engine that delivers an impressive 285 horsepower and 260 lb-ft of torque, ensuring that you have the muscle to tackle any terrain. Whether you're cruising down the highway or navigating rocky trails, this Jeep provides a smooth and exhilarating ride.  Step inside and discover a spacious, comfortable cabin thats designed for both functionality and fun. The Wrangler Unlimited Sport comes with durable cloth upholstery, providing a cozy atmosphere for all your adventures. With seating for five, there's plenty of room for family and friends to join in on the journey!  This vehicle is packed with factory default features to enhance your driving experience. Enjoy the convenience of power windows and door locks, as well as keyless entry for easy access. The Uconnect infotainment system keeps you connected with a 5-inch touchscreen, Bluetooth connectivity for hands-free calling, and a six-speaker audio system that will make your favorite tunes sound fantastic on the go.  You'll also appreciate the practicality of the removable soft top, allowing you to embrace the sunshine and fresh air whenever the mood strikes. The Wrangler Unlimited Sport is equipped with all-terrain tires, heavy-duty suspension, and skid plates, ensuring that you can confidently conquer any adventure that comes your way.  Safety is a priority with features such as front and side airbags, stability control, and traction control, giving you peace of mind on every journey. Plus, with a clean CARFAX report, you can feel confident knowing this vehicle has been well-maintained and is ready for its next adventure!  In excellent overall condition, this 2016 Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Sport is not just a vehicle; it's a lifestyle. Get ready to make unforgettable memories as you hit the road (or trail) in this versatile and spirited SUV! description: Our 2017 Mercedes-Benz GLS 550 4MATIC® in Black should be at the top of your list with its world-class accommodations and superior performance! Powered by a TurboCharged 4.7 Liter Biturbo V8 offering 449hp matched to a paddle-shifted 9 Speed Automatic transmission. Artistry and engineering go hand in hand to offer a capable All Wheel Drive SUV with remarkable agility that can tow your boat with ease while still offering nearly 18mpg on the highway, while showing off distinct AMG® wheels, dual chrome exhaust tips, and LED headlights.   The GLS 550 interior welcomes up to seven adults to three rows of luxury seating. Innovation and indulgence reign supreme with features such as a power liftgate, power-folding third row, 60/40-split second row, keyless ignition/entry, multi-color ambient lighting, an auto-dimming rearview mirror, and 3-zone automatic climate control. Highly adjustable multi-contour heated/ventilated/massaging leather seats provide ultimate comfort as you open the sunroof and check out the COMAND interface with a high-resolution color screen, navigation, voice controls, Apple CarPlay®, Harman Kardon Audio, and available satellite radio. The robust Cummins diesel engine delivers exceptional power and torque, while the 6-speed automatic transmission ensures smooth, responsive performance. The 4-wheel drive system provides confident handling in all conditions, and the auto-leveling rear air suspension ensures a comfortable ride, even with a heavy payload.  The interior of this Big Horn is packed with premium features that elevate the driving experience. The Uconnect 4C Nav system with an 8.4" touchscreen display puts seamless connectivity and navigation at your fingertips. Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration allow you to easily access your smartphone's apps and features. Heated front seats and a heated steering wheel keep you cozy on cold days, while the ParkSense front and rear park assist system makes maneuvering a breeze.  Exterior upgrades like the power-folding chrome trailer tow mirrors, wheel-to-wheel side steps, and spray-in bedliner add both style and functionality. The Harvest Edition package also includes unique styling cues that set this 2500 Big Horn apart from the crowd.  Whether you're tackling tough job site tasks, towing a heavy trailer, or embarking on an off-road adventure, this 2018 Ram 2500 Big Horn is built to handle it all. Experience the uncompromising capability and premium features that make this truck a true standout in the heavy-duty segment. description: Introducing the 2018 GMC Sierra 3500HD Base, a robust powerhouse of a truck that seamlessly combines strength, reliability, and functionality. This formidable vehicle, dressed in a classic white exterior, is designed to conquer any challenge you throw its way, whether it's heavy-duty work or a weekend adventure. With the Sierra 3500HD, you're not just buying a truck; you're investing in a legacy of durability and performance.  Under the hood, the Sierra 3500HD boasts the mighty Vortec 6.0L Flex Fuel V8 engine, delivering an impressive 360 horsepower and 380 lb-ft of torque. This engine is not just about power; it's about versatility and efficiency, offering the flexibility to run on alternative fuels. Whether you're towing, hauling, or simply cruising down the highway, this engine ensures you have all the muscle you need to get the job done with confidence and ease.  Paired with a 6-Speed Shiftable Automatic transmission, the Sierra 3500HD provides a smooth and responsive driving experience. This transmission adapts to your driving style, offering seamless gear changes that optimize performance and fuel efficiency. Whether you're navigating city streets or tackling rugged terrains, this truck offers the control and precision you need.  Step inside, and you'll find an interior that is both functional and comfortable. The durable vinyl seating is designed to withstand the rigors of daily use while providing a comfortable ride for you and your passengers. The interior layout is thoughtfully designed, ensuring that all controls and features are within easy reach, making your driving experience as convenient as possible.  One of the standout attributes of this vehicle is its recognition by Edmunds for Best Retained Value: Standard Brand Honorable Mention. This accolade speaks volumes about the Sierra 3500HD's long-term value and reliability. When you choose this truck, you're choosing a vehicle that holds its value over time, offering you peace of mind and a smart investment.  The 2018 GMC Sierra 3500HD Base is more than just a truck; it's a statement of strength and capability. Its classic white exterior exudes a timeless appeal that will turn heads wherever you go. This truck is built to last, with a reputation for durability that makes it a favorite among those who demand the best from their vehicles.  In summary, the 2018 GMC Sierra 3500HD Base is a testament to GMC's commitment to quality and performance. With its powerful V8 engine, versatile transmission, and durable interior, it is ready to tackle any task with ease. Its recognition for retained value further underscores its reliability and long-term appeal. Don't miss the opportunity to own a truck that is as dependable as it is powerful. Visit us today to experience the Sierra 3500HD for yourself and discover why it's the perfect choice for those who refuse to settle for anything less than the best.

description: Introducing the 2018 Honda Pilot EX, a masterclass in style, performance, and practicality, wrapped in a vibrant red exterior that commands attention on every road. This SUV is more than just a vehicle; it's a statement of sophistication and reliability, ready to elevate your driving experience to new heights.  Under the hood, the Pilot EX boasts a robust 3.5L V6 engine, delivering an impressive 280 horsepower and 262 ft. lbs. of torque. This powerhouse ensures you have the muscle you need for smooth highway cruising, confident overtaking, and tackling any adventure that comes your way. Paired with a 6-Speed Shiftable Automatic transmission, the Pilot offers seamless gear transitions and a driving experience that is as smooth as it is exhilarating.  Step inside to discover an inviting interior adorned with durable and comfortable cloth seats, providing the perfect blend of comfort and practicality. The spacious cabin is designed with your family in mind, offering ample room across three rows, ensuring that every journey is as comfortable as it is enjoyable. Whether you're heading on a long road trip or just a quick jaunt around town, the Pilot EX is your perfect companion.  The 2018 Honda Pilot EX is not just about power and comfort; it's about delivering exceptional value and peace of mind. Recognized by Edmunds's Best Retained Value: Standard Brand Honorable Mention, this SUV promises to hold its value, making it a smart investment for the future. Furthermore, it has been celebrated by Kelley Blue Book with multiple accolades, including Best Three-Row Mid-Size SUVs for Families, Best Overall Brand, Best Value Brand, Most Refined Brand, and Best Buy: Midsize SUV. These awards reflect the Pilots exceptional quality, family-friendly features, and unmatched value.  Every detail of the Pilot EX has been meticulously crafted to cater to your needs. Its commanding presence on the road is matched by a host of features designed to enhance your driving pleasure. From its intuitive controls to its advanced safety features, the Pilot is engineered to provide a driving experience that is as safe as it is enjoyable. With Hondas reputation for reliability, you can embark on every journey with confidence, knowing that youre backed by one of the most trusted names in the automotive industry.  Imagine the possibilities with the 2018 Honda Pilot EX. Whether it's the daily commute, weekend getaways, or family vacations, this SUV is equipped to handle it all with style and grace. Its striking red exterior is more than just a color; it's an expression of your bold spirit and a testament to Honda's commitment to excellence.  In the 2018 Honda Pilot EX, youre not just purchasing a vehicle; youre investing in a lifestyle of confidence, reliability, and unparalleled satisfaction. Dont miss the chance to own a vehicle that has been celebrated by industry experts and loved by families. The Honda Pilot EX is waiting to take you on your next adventure. Are you ready to make it yours?

description: This *2018 Honda Pilot EX-L*, has a Obsidian Blue Pearl exterior and an Gray interior color. 165,853 miles. Stock Number PT4531A. You can connect with us by calling 336-566-2022. This vehicle is offered by Classic Toyota of Wilkesboro and we are located at 1511 W D St North Wilkesboro NC 28659*Important Package and Feature Information*=== Convenience ===  *  Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.=== Safety and Security ===  *  Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.  *  Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.=== Technology and Telematics ===  *  Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.  *  Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.At Classic Toyota of Wilkesboro, we're here to *Serve you!* Our staff is 100% dedicated to customer satisfaction and we understand that you need clear, transparent information throughout the car buying process. The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. This sleek sedan is perfect for daily commutes, weekend getaways, or simply cruising through the scenic streets of Jackson, MO. Whether you're a busy professional or a growing family, this car offers the versatility you need while ensuring a smooth ride. The 2020 Nissan Altima stands out with its striking gray exterior and luxurious black leather interior, making it a stylish choice for any driver. With a mileage of 65,074, this sedan offers an exceptional balance of performance and efficiency. Equipped with a 2.5L 4-cylinder engine and a continuously variable transmission (CVT), the Altima achieves an impressive 27 MPG in the city and 37 MPG on the highway. This makes it an ideal option for budget-conscious buyers looking to save on fuel without sacrificing performance.  Inside the Altima, you will find a spacious cabin designed for comfort and convenience. With room for five passengers, this sedan is perfect for families or anyone needing extra space for friends and cargo. Enjoy the driver multi-adjustable power seat, which allows you to find your perfect driving position, or take advantage of the ample legroom and headroom for both front and rear passengers. The vehicle's advanced safety features include standard 4-wheel ABS, child safety door locks, and multiple airbags, providing peace of mind during every drive.  For those who appreciate modern tech, the Nissan Altima doesn't disappoint. With features like cruise control and power windows, this vehicle is designed with the driver in mind. The standard vehicle anti-theft system adds an extra layer of security, making it one of the quality used vehicles you can trust.  At First Auto Credit Missouri, we pride ourselves on being a leading used car dealer in the area, featuring a wide variety of used vehicles for sale at competitive prices. Our dealership is committed to providing transparent financing options, ensuring that you can drive away in the vehicle you love without the stress of complicated loans. Whether you're searching for cheap used cars or certified pre-owned options, our team is here to help you navigate the process smoothly.  Living in Jackson, you'll appreciate the convenience of exploring nearby attractions and neighborhoods with your new Altima. Head out to the stunning trails at the nearby Cape Girardeau Conservation Nature Center, or enjoy a family outing at the Jackson City Park. This sedan is perfect for all your local adventures while providing the reliability needed for those longer trips.  Don't miss out on this opportunity to own a vehicle that combines style, efficiency, and comfort. Visit us today at First Auto Credit Missouri, located at 2990 Old Orchard Rd, Jackson, MO 63755, or apply online to get started on your journey towards owning this fantastic 2020 Nissan Altima 2.5 SR.
